Our Story

Real Food.
Real Views.
Real Satara.

Perched on the 3rd floor of Hotel Gulbahar at Powai Naka, The Urban Grill Kitchen is Satara’s most talked-about rooftop destination — built around a love for exceptional food and the magic of dining under the stars.

From live tandoor starters and rich Indian curries to wood-fired pizzas, Asian fusion, and craft mocktails — every dish is made with intention.

Rooftop Seating Dine-In & Delivery Private Parties Groups Welcome Kid Friendly Free Parking
Fire.
Spice.
Satara’s Rooftop.

Why UGK

The experience
speaks for itself.

A rooftop destination where every detail is designed to make you want to return.

🌇
Rooftop Views
Dine above Satara on a beautifully curated terrace atop Hotel Gulbahar, Powai Naka.
🔥
Live Tandoor
Watch chefs craft smoky kebabs straight from the clay tandoor — fire and flavour.
🌏
Global Flavours
Indian curries, Asian fusion, wood-fired pizza, craft mocktails — all under one roof.
🎂
Private Events
Birthdays, anniversaries, group dinners — we make every celebration unforgettable.
✦
Boho Ambience
Aesthetically curated interiors where every corner is a backdrop worth remembering.
🚗
Easy Access
Free parking, delivery, takeaway, and no-contact delivery available.

“Every corner feels aesthetic — the food was fresh, flavorful, and beautifully presented. The best rooftop in Satara.”

— Google Reviews · 4.3 Stars · 36 Reviews

★★★★★
